hero.title: AI Consultant & Software Developer
hero.subtitle: Romania
hero.tagline: I help companies and individuals adopt AI, ship modern software, and navigate Romania's tech landscape.

aiFuture.title: AI is rewriting how we build, work, and learn
aiFuture.body: From GPT-class assistants and Claude-powered agents to multi-modal models that see, hear, and reason, AI is moving from a tool you query to a collaborator you delegate to. In the next five years, autonomous agents will plan and execute multi-step work, every team will have a copilot, and the gap between idea and product will collapse. The opportunity is no longer access to AI — it is integrating it well, safely, and with measurable outcomes. That is exactly where I help.

consult.title: AI Consulting & Strategy
consult.desc: Adoption roadmaps, vendor selection, and ROI-driven AI plans.

agents.title: AI Agent & Chatbot Design
agents.desc: LangChain, CrewAI, and custom chatbots that ship to production.

workflow.title: Workflow Automation
workflow.desc: Automate lead intake, follow-ups, CRM updates, and repetitive tasks.

dev.title: Software Development
dev.desc: Full-stack web apps, APIs, and integrations.

career.title: Career Consulting in Romania
career.desc: CV review, market insights, and interview prep for the Romanian tech market.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: From first conversation to a live AI system — four clear steps.

discover.title: Tell me what's broken
discover.desc: A free 30-minute call to identify where you're losing time and money, and what AI can fix first.

plan.title: I map out the plan
plan.desc: You get a specific solution, tool selection, timeline, and projected ROI — before any work begins.

build.title: I build and launch
build.desc: Full implementation without you needing to manage developers. Connects to your existing tools and goes live.

support.title: I keep it running
support.desc: Monitoring, performance tuning, monthly reviews, and expanding capabilities as your business grows.

whatDrivesUs.title: Purpose behind the work
whatDrivesUs.subtitle: Not just building AI — building AI that actually matters for your business.

mission.title: Mission
mission.desc: Take the manual, repetitive work off your plate so you can focus on what actually grows your business — relationships, strategy, and the work only you can do.

vision.title: Vision
vision.desc: Enable any business — regardless of size — to operate with the speed and efficiency of a company ten times larger through practical, reliable AI.

values.title: Values
values.desc: Pragmatic over fashionable. The right model, the right framework, and the smallest system that solves the problem. No hype, just results.

1.quote: Emad turned a six-month roadmap into a working agent in three weeks.
1.author: CTO, fintech startup

2.quote: The clearest, most practical AI consulting we've had.
2.author: Head of Product, EU SaaS

3.quote: Helped me land a senior dev role in Bucharest — interview prep was gold.
3.author: Software Engineer

hero.title: About Emad
hero.subtitle: AI consultant, software developer, and tech advisor based in Romania.

bio.title: A short story
bio.p1: I'm Emad — a software developer turned AI consultant. Over the last decade I've shipped products across e-commerce, SaaS, and fintech, and over the last three years I've focused almost entirely on AI: agent design, retrieval, evals, and turning prototypes into reliable production systems.
bio.p2: I'm based in CLUJ NAPOCA. I work with companies adopting AI for the first time, with engineering teams building agentic products, and with individuals navigating the Romanian tech market.
bio.p3: I prefer pragmatic over fashionable: the right model, the right framework, and the smallest possible system that actually solves the problem.

skills.title: Skills & Stack
skills.subtitle: What I reach for, day to day.

1.role: AI Consultant (in collaboration with the Academy CAREERPRENEUR)
1.summary: Advising European SMEs and startups on AI adoption and shipping production agents.

2.summary: Collaboration with 6-engineer team building a payments platform, then drove the AI roadmap.

3.summary: Owned core checkout and integrations across multiple Stripe regions.

4.summary: Shipped 30+ client projects in PHP, Node.js, and early React.
